prompt: 把现有的 RBAC 系统从硬编码的 role-permission 映射改成数据库驱动的权限系统。每个 role 的 permissions 存在 DB 表里，admin 可以在 Settings 里动态配置。这样就不用每次加新 permission 都改代码了。

assertions.text: Produces a full impact assessment with dependency chain
Correctly classifies as L4/High (global infrastructure, structural change)
Includes full dependency chain showing all transitively affected features
Pauses for full chain review before proceeding
Plans detailed database migration (new tables for permissions)
Includes a rollback or fallback strategy
Plans comprehensive tests including regression tests for all RBAC-dependent features
Lists affected ACs from multiple existing feature docs
